definition.card: Error: this tab is running an old version of the site. Reload your browser (refresh the page) to view this companion's definition.

companion.name: Taryn
companion.short_description: A forty-four-year-old goth. Is she authentic, or just an aging phony clinging to her youth?

portraits.name: Club
portraits.description: Club, bar, dance, drinking, dance club, goth club
